calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Winnie Chan'S Notic And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment After Service By Publication (Ccp 585(C))
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jason Lundberg, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, WINNIE CHAN.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AMELIA WONG.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Winnie Chan sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $3,500.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,624.00
Attorney's Fees: $850.00
Costs: $1,540.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $8,114.00
Judgment signed in open court.
